objective: Train and evaluate a small offline adaptive controller that decides which external tool actions to spend on Foofah-style table transformations.

controller.policy_class: depth-1 decision tree over deployable table/direct-output features
controller.training_protocol: Fit leaf actions on pilot train, select tree on pilot dev by accuracy, then direct-correct losses, then token cost; freeze before held-out test.

primary_metric: Held-out exact accuracy vs total forward-token cost.
nondeployable_diagnostics: oracle best available action per task
scope_note: This is an offline controller evaluation over a fixed recorded candidate pool. It charges only the actions a policy would have taken, but it does not regenerate model outputs.
